appliedUpdates.description: Added item #11 to the Python 3.12+ Compatibility Fixes Applied list: the pandas 3.x eval() object dtype fix in extended_projection (infer_objects() call), noting that pandas_duckdb.py was not updated.

rejectedObservations.observation: Recommend adding a note to AGENTS.md about the pandas_duckdb.py gap
rejectedObservations.reason: The gap is now documented in library/environment.md which is the appropriate place for this factual knowledge about the codebase. AGENTS.md is for normative boundaries, not per-file compatibility notes. Adding it to AGENTS.md would be over-documentation.
